content: Phase 1: Create supabase_schema.sql with all tables, RLS, indexes
Phase 1: Create POC script (bracket gen + Supabase insert/vote/advance) and pass for N=2,5,7,10,13,19
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent
Phase 2: Frontend scaffolding (HashRouter, Supabase client, local identity)
Phase 2: Player flow (login → predict → vote → bracket → waiting → winner)
Phase 2: Admin flow (PIN gate, dashboard, game create/manage, controls)
Phase 3: Admin quality (emails, BCC, tie resolution, resets, merge)
Phase 3: Visual polish (theme editor, animations, confetti, TV mode)
Phase 4: Edge cases, audit log, deployment instructions, final test
